summary: Class coverage and dist/source parity look intact, but two badge states were recolored below readable contrast on the new light paper theme.

findings.title: `pending` and `auto` badges are too low-contrast for 10px status text on the new paper background
findings.recommendation: Use darker foreground/border tokens for `.badge.pending` and `.badge.auto`, or add a filled background treatment, so these statuses meet at least normal-text contrast on `--paper`/white cards. As shipped, `--warn` (#b07215) is about 3.76:1 on `--paper`, and `--brass` (#b4862a) is about 3.10:1, which is not readable enough for the 10px uppercase badge text rendered by `main.tsx`.
